required_preferences.fact: No longer schedules regular calls or video chats with his childhood friend due to the friend's limited phone access in assisted living — instead, sends occasional cards or letters as able

supersedes.fact: Video calls his childhood friend every Wednesday evening — avoids traditional voice calls due to trouble understanding speech over the phone with hearing aids

required_preferences.fact: Spends Friday evenings reading or doing puzzles at home when his wife is at the exhibition — only plays Scrabble together when she is available

supersedes.fact: Plays Scrabble with his wife on Friday nights — never watches TV during their time together

required_preferences.fact: Invites another long-time acquaintance for an occasional afternoon coffee to help fill the social gap left by his friend’s move
Checks weather and reads the local newspaper online before starting any tasks in the morning
Sources new inventory from estate sales and library auctions only — never buys from thrift stores
Restores damaged vintage books as a hobby — never resells items needing major repairs

persona: A retired teacher supplementing income by reselling vintage books online
